reasoning.problem:
I intend to submit two bills to address the most pressing issues: Dynasty concentration and STALE_ORDER failures.

Bill 1: Diversification Mandate
Title: Address Dynasty Concentration
Description: To mitigate risk, I propose a mandatory diversification of the Dynasty wallet. This bill would require allocating assets from Dynasty to other wallets in a manner that no single wallet holds more than 30% of total assets. I will implement this by following the Threshold Pattern from the SELF_EVOLUTION_MANUAL.md. I will modify asset allocation and observe wallet balances to verify the change. This requires Human Gate approval before I can proceed.

Bill 2: STALE_ORDER Diagnostic and Repair
Title: Unlock Scar Cluster STALE_ORDER
Description: To address the recurring STALE_ORDER failures, I request unlocking the scar_cluster:STALE_ORDER. This will allow me to begin the diagnostic and repair process, identifying the root cause of these failures and implementing preventative measures. I will begin this by following the Behavior Pattern from the SELF_EVOLUTION_MANUAL.md. I will modify failure handling and observe the STALE_ORDER error rate to verify the change. This requires Human Gate approval before I can proceed.
